data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Centenario Tequila/
data.description: Centenario Tequila has partnered with renowned Mexican goalkeeper Memo Ochoa for the "Memos for Mexico" campaign. This initiative involves creating a new "Cielito Lindo" remix to celebrate Mexican pride. The news was announced on 02-Apr-2026 by Centenario Tequila through PR Newswire. Keep an eye out for this exciting collaboration aimed at energizing fans and showcasing national pride.

data.title: Corti Inc: KNITTING INJURY? THERE'S A BILLING CODE FOR THAT(NOT AN APRIL FOOLS' JOKE)
data.description: In the USA and Copenhagen, Denmark, on April 7, 2026, an intriguing report has surfaced on unusual medical billing codes shedding light on the lifestyles of Americans. The expenses incurred when matters go awry and the breakthrough role of AI in rectifying the situation are also highlighted. Each visit to a physician necessitates detailed records of symptoms, procedures, and diagnoses, and the intricate web of codes involved in the process is being closely examined.

data.title: Phanes Therapeutics announces dose expansion in clinical study of spevatamig in combination with chemotherapy for treatment of biliary tract cancer
data.description: Phanes Therapeutics, Inc. (Phanes), a clinical stage biotech company based in San Diego, revealed on April 7, 2026, that they have commenced the dose expansion phase of their clinical trial assessing spevatamig. This drug discovery and development company specializes in oncology.

data.title: Idle Game With Questionable Fish Science - Black Hole Fishing Launches Today
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 7, 2026, SDG Games introduced a new game called Black Hole Fishing on Steam. This innovative incremental game aims to transform a regular pond into a lucrative venture by incorporating the concept of gravitational force. The game speeds up the process of fishing by introducing a singularity, making it a potentially profitable endeavor. Starting with...

data.title: Centenario Tequila Teams Up with Legendary Mexican Goalkeeper Memo Ochoa for "Memos for Mexico" – a New Fan-Fueled "Cielito Lindo" Remix to Celebrate Mexican Pride
data.description: Goalkeeper Memo Ochoa, along with Centenario Tequila, has announced a unique opportunity for fans to showcase their singing talents. They are inviting fans to submit voice and video recordings of themselves singing the iconic anthem by texting them to (760) 606-2462. This initiative offers fans the chance to be featured in the official summer fútbol hype track. The announcement was made in Jersey City, N.J., on April 2, 2026. México fans are encouraged to grab their phones and participate in this exciting opportunity to show their support for their team.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Grand Opening of Clara Vista at Waterridge in Kyle, Texas
data.description: Two brand new model homes will be unveiled at the Grand Opening event happening this Saturday, April 11th. The event will showcase the latest designs and features of these homes, with a focus on modern amenities and innovative layouts. Visitors can explore the two models, which offer a combined total of 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and over 3,000 square feet of living space. Additionally, attendees will have the opportunity to meet with home builders and discuss customization options. This highly anticipated event is set to attract a large crowd, with over 200 guests expected to attend.

data.title: Comox Valley Regional District Workers Ratify New Agreement
data.description: In Courtenay, British Columbia, workers from the Comox Valley Regional District, who are part of CUPE 556, have approved a new collective agreement. Sonya Jenssen, the president of CUPE 556, expressed satisfaction with the outcome, mentioning the importance of delivering public services in the region. The agreement acknowledges the essential services provided by the members of CUPE 556 and guarantees stable, quality services for residents and businesses. This development signifies a positive step for the workers and the community.

data.title: Catalina Island Health Selects Echo-Factory as Healthcare Marketing Agency of Record
data.description: A healthcare marketing agency in Los Angeles has been chosen to spearhead brand strategy, digital marketing, and patient growth efforts for Catalina Island Health. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, by Catalina Island Health. Echo-Factory, located in Pasadena, will lead the initiatives as per their selection by Catalina Island Health.

data.title: Wishpond Announces SalesCloser Trading Date
data.description: Vancouver-based Wishpond Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: WISH, OTCQX: WPNDF) has disclosed that the common shares of SalesCloser Technologies Ltd. are set to begin trading as detailed in their previous announcement on March 26, 2026.

data.title: JAG Management Company Adds Frederick BTR to Mid-Atlantic Portfolio
data.description: JAG Management Company has been chosen by Couloir Ventures to oversee the management of The Foundry at Renn Quarter, a new build-to-rent townhome community in Frederick, Maryland. Situated at 264 Monroe Avenue near historic Downtown Frederick, this development will consist of 176 multi-level townhomes upon completion. Phase 1 has commenced with the introduction of 75 rental homes. Each townhome offers three bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and high-end finishes.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Falter As Trump's Iran Ultimatum Shakes Sentiment
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a drop on Tuesday amid increasing geopolitical tensions caused in part by Donald Trump's warning to Iran. As of the latest figures, the prices for various cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $68,576.33, Ethereum at $2,092.99, Solana at $79.93, XRP at $1.30, Dogecoin at $0.09173, and Shiba Inu at $0.0005898. In the last 24 hours, Coinglass data reveals that 79,800 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses amounting to $181.99 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicates a total of $471.3 million inflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Monday, with spot Ethereum ETFs seeing $120.2 million inflows. Top performers of the past day include edgeX, Zcash, and Bitcoin SV. Ripple has set its sights on Africa's $205 billion...For more details, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.
